languages.text: "Хочешь сказать, что ты решил признать поражение и сдаться?"
"Do you mean to say that you admit defeat and wish to surrender?"
languages.original_text: "Хочешь сказать, что ты решил признать поражение и сдаться?"

traits.locale_text: "Do you mean to say that you admit defeat and wish to surrender?"
"Do you mean to say that you admit defeat and wish to surrender?"
"Do you mean to say that you admit defeat and wish to surrender?"

languages.text: «¿Quieres decir que admites la derrota y deseas capitular?».
languages.original_text: "Do you mean to say that you admit defeat and wish to surrender?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Quieres decir que admites la derrota y deseas capitular?».

languages.text: “你的意思是，你承认失败，打算投降了？”
languages.original_text: "Do you mean to say that you admit defeat and wish to surrender?"

traits.locale_text: “你的意思是，你承认失败，打算投降了？”

languages.text: « Voulez-vous dire que vous vous avouez vaincu et souhaitez vous rendre ? »
languages.original_text: "Do you mean to say that you admit defeat and wish to surrender?"

traits.locale_text: « Voulez-vous dire que vous vous avouez vaincu et souhaitez vous rendre ? »

languages.text: "Yenilgiyi kabul ettiğini ve teslim olmak istediğini mi söylüyorsun?"
languages.original_text: "Do you mean to say that you admit defeat and wish to surrender?"

traits.locale_text: "Yenilgiyi kabul ettiğini ve teslim olmak istediğini mi söylüyorsun?"

languages.text: "Soll das heißen, Ihr erkennt Eure Niederlage an und wollt Euch ergeben?"
languages.original_text: "Do you mean to say that you admit defeat and wish to surrender?"

traits.locale_text: "Soll das heißen, Ihr erkennt Eure Niederlage an und wollt Euch ergeben?"

languages.text: 「つまり、あなたは敗北を認めて降伏したいのですか」
languages.original_text: "Do you mean to say that you admit defeat and wish to surrender?"

traits.locale_text: 「つまり、あなたは敗北を認めて降伏したいのですか」
